style_effects: Dust particles swirl in chaotic spirals around Blastoise's fists and shell, kicked up from cracked earth textures that shimmer with each impact. A deep crimson aura pulses at contact points, intensifying with every strike, casting warm amber shadows on the trembling ground. The lighting mood is gritty and intense, with smoky red-orange glows highlighting the battle's raw power, ending with clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
